query:
SELECT university, major, COUNT(*) as count, MAX(createdAt) as latest
FROM project_matches 
GROUP BY university, major 
ORDER BY latest DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT university, major, COUNT(*) as count, MAX(createdAt) as latest
FROM project_matches 
GROUP BY university, major 
ORDER BY latest DESC 
LIMIT 10;
stdout:
